_comment: Welcome email auto-sent by the 222 alignment workflow (WHMCS SendEmail, customtype=product, id=<serviceid>) whenever the pid-39 "Domain Registered in Cloudflare" product is placed on a client. Merge fields resolve per service. If a WHMCS product Welcome Email is ALSO configured in admin, disable one to avoid a double-send.
subject: Your domain {$service_domain} is managed in Cloudflare by Free For Charity
htmlBody:
Hi {$client_name},

Good news — {$service_domain} is now set up under Free For Charity's Cloudflare account. This is the "Domain Registered in Cloudflare" service on your account, and it means your domain's DNS is managed for you in Cloudflare as part of the free services we provide.

Important — how to make changes: so we can keep your website and email working correctly, please do not change DNS records, nameservers, or registrar settings yourself. If you need any domain or DNS change — a new record, an email/DNS setting, a redirect, or a transfer — please open a support ticket and our volunteers will take care of it:

Open a support ticket

Making changes outside of Cloudflare can take your website or email offline, so this one step protects your organization.

Thank you for the work you do,
The Free For Charity Team
